class-roster-cleaner.label: Pwojè final kou a: Netwayè lis klas la
class-roster-cleaner.summary: Bati pwosesis netwayaj lis la kòm yon koule kontinyèl: enspekte ekspòtasyon an, netwaye ranje yo, modilize lojik la, rezime klas la, epi voye rapò final yo.

sketch0.title: Kliyan final ou a: biwo lekòl la

cp_2.title: Netwaye yon ranje nan lis la

cp_3.title: Sote ranje ki pa bon yo an sekirite

cp_4.title: Mete netwayaj nan yon modil èd.

cp-1-read-roster-file.title: Li fichye lis la
cp-1-read-roster-file.prompt: Biwo lekòl la voye ou yon fichye ki rele "`data/roster.csv`" epi li di, "Anvan nou fè konfyans fichye sa a, èske ou ka montre nou egzakteman sa li genyen ladan l?" Li fichye a epi enprime chak liy brit san okenn liy vid anplis, enkli liy antèt la.
cp-1-read-roster-file.hint: Kòmanse pa enspekte ekspòtasyon brit la egzakteman jan li te rive.

help.concept: Yon pwojè netwayaj done ki fèt ak anpil atansyon kòmanse ak vizibilite: li fichye sous la anvan ou transfòme li.
help.hint_2: Fè yon bouk sou fichye a epi enprime `line.strip()`.

cp-2-clean-one-row.title: Netwaye yon ranje nan lis la
cp-2-clean-one-row.prompt: Kòmanse ak apèsi lis ou deja bati a. Kenbe kontèks sa a, epi ajoute `clean_row(line)` pou yon ranje done vin tounen yon diksyonè ki gen `name` netwaye, `score` antye, ak `email` an lèt piti. Li premye ranje done a ankò epi enprime diksyonè netwaye a.
cp-2-clean-one-row.hint: Enspekte an premye, apre sa re-itilize menm fòm fichye a pou teste asistan an sou yon ranje.

help.concept: Yon fwa yon ranje gen yon fòm ki fyab, tout pwojè a ka reitilize menm lojik netwayaj sa a pou chak ranje.
help.hint_2: Sèvi ak `.strip().title()` pou non, `int(...)` pou nòt, ak `.strip().lower()` pou imèl.

cp-2-clean-one-row.starterCode:
with open("data/roster.csv") as file:
    for line in file:
        print(line.strip())

# Keep the raw roster preview above as your starting point.
# Next, write clean_row(line) so one data row becomes a cleaned dictionary.
def clean_row(line):
    # Split name, score, and email, then return the cleaned record.
    pass

with open("data/roster.csv") as file:
    next(file)
    first_row = next(file)

# Print the cleaned first data row.
print(clean_row(first_row))

cp-3-skip-bad-roster-rows.title: Sote ranje ki pa bon yo an sekirite
cp-3-skip-bad-roster-rows.prompt: Kenbe asistan `clean_row(line)` k ap fonksyone nan dènye etap la. Kounye a, fè yon bouk sou ranje done yo, ranmase dosye ki valab e ki netwaye, epi sote ranje ki pa valab yo pou netwayè lis la rete itil.
cp-3-skip-bad-roster-rows.hint: Sèvi ak menm asistan an pou chak ranje olye pou w refè netwayaj la an liy.

help.concept: Fichye reyèl yo raman pafè. Yon zouti done itil pwoteje koule travay la lè li ranmase anrejistreman ki valab epi sote ranje li pa ka netwaye.
help.hint_1: Kreye yon tablo `records = []`, epi fè yon bouk sou ranje yo apre antèt la.
help.hint_2: Ajoute andedan `try` epi sote ranje ki pa valab nan `except ValueError`.

1.message: Trape ValueError pou liy move nan lis la.

cp-4-move-cleaning-to-module.title: Mete netwayaj nan yon modil èd.
cp-4-move-cleaning-to-module.prompt: Kòmanse ak pwogram ki netwaye lis travay la nan `main.py`. Mete `clean_row(line)` nan `tools/cleaning.py`, enpòte li tounen nan `main.py`, epi kenbe rezilta dosye ki netwaye yo egzakteman menm jan.
cp-4-move-cleaning-to-module.hint: Etap sa a se yon refactoring, pa yon reekriti: workflow la rete nan `main.py`, epi detay netwayaj yo deplase nan modil èd la.

help.concept: Lè yon pwojè grandi, modil èd yo kenbe fichye prensipal la konsantre sou workflow la olye de detay yo.
help.hint_1: Kreye yon kont `tools/cleaning.py` epi deplase kont `clean_row(line)` la ladan l.
help.hint_2: Nan `main.py`, ranplase fonksyon lokal la ak `from tools.cleaning import clean_row`.

cp-5-add-summary-functions.title: Ajoute fonksyon rezime
cp-5-add-summary-functions.prompt: Kenbe netwayè ki baze sou helper nan etap anvan an. Kounye a, ajoute `tools/scoring.py` pou pwojè a ka enprime nòt mwayèn nan awondi a yon plas desimal ak kantite pas.
cp-5-add-summary-functions.hint: Ajoute kalkil nòt la nan edè yo, epi ranplase apèsi dosye brit la ak de liy rezime yo.

help.concept: Rapò yo anjeneral bezwen rezime, pa sèlman ranje ki netwaye. Fonksyon èd fè kalkil sa yo fasil pou teste ak re-itilize.
help.hint_2: Enpòte toude helper yo nan `main.py`, epi enprime `Average: ...` ak `Passing: ...`.

cp-5-add-summary-functions.starterCode:
from tools.cleaning import clean_row

records = []
with open("data/roster.csv") as file:
    next(file)
    for line in file:
        try:
            records.append(clean_row(line))
        except ValueError:
            continue

print(records)

# Replace the raw records preview with summary helpers.
# Add average_score(records) and passing_count(records) in tools/scoring.py, then print both summary lines here.

main_py.content:
from tools.cleaning import clean_row
from tools.scoring import average_score, passing_count

records = []
with open("data/roster.csv") as file:
    next(file)
    for line in file:
        try:
            records.append(clean_row(line))
        except ValueError:
            continue

print(f"Average: {average_score(records):.1f}")
print(f"Passing: {passing_count(records)}")

0.message: Enpòte average_score ak passing_count soti nan tools.scoring.

1.message: Sèvi ak average_score(records) pou kalkile mwayèn nan.

2.message: Sèvi ak passing_count(records) pou kalkile kantite pasaj.

from tools.cleaning import clean_row

cp-6-write-final-reports.title: Ekri rapò final yo
cp-6-write-final-reports.prompt: Kòmanse ak netwayè a ki deja enprime mwayèn nan ak kantite pase yo. Konplete transfè a lè w ajoute asistan rapò yo, ekri `output/clean_roster.csv` ak `output/summary.txt`, epi enprime liy kantite netwaye a ak rezime final la.
cp-6-write-final-reports.hint: Tounen rezime travay la an livrabl: ekri tou de fichye yo, epi enprime kantite ki netwaye a ansanm ak liy rezime yo.

help.concept: Yon pwojè reyèl fini ak livrabl: fichye ki netwaye ak yon rezime yon lòt moun ka itilize.
help.hint_2: Rele asistan sa yo pou de chemen sòti yo, epi enprime kantite dosye ki netwaye yo ansanm ak mwayèn nan ak liy ki pase yo.

cp-6-write-final-reports.starterCode:
from tools.cleaning import clean_row
from tools.scoring import average_score, passing_count

records = []
with open("data/roster.csv") as file:
    next(file)
    for line in file:
        try:
            records.append(clean_row(line))
        except ValueError:
            continue

print(f"Average: {average_score(records):.1f}")
print(f"Passing: {passing_count(records)}")

# Finish the handoff by adding tools/reports.py.
# Write output/clean_roster.csv and output/summary.txt, then print the cleaned record count too.

data_roster_csv.content:

tools_reports_py.content: # Add write_clean_roster(records, path) and write_summary(records, path) here.

main_py.content:
from tools.cleaning import clean_row
from tools.scoring import average_score, passing_count
from tools.reports import write_clean_roster, write_summary
from pathlib import Path
Path("output").mkdir(exist_ok=True)


records = []
with open("data/roster.csv") as file:
    next(file)
    for line in file:
        try:
            records.append(clean_row(line))
        except ValueError:
            continue

write_clean_roster(records, "output/clean_roster.csv")
write_summary(records, "output/summary.txt")
print(f"Cleaned {len(records)} records")
print(f"Average: {average_score(records):.1f}")
print(f"Passing: {passing_count(records)}")

data_roster_csv.content:
name,score,email
 ava smith ,92, AVA@EXAMPLE.COM
Mia Chen,not-a-score,mia@example.com
Zoe Ray,87,zoe@example.com
Leo West,74, leo@example.com

tools_reports_py.content:
import os
from tools.scoring import average_score, passing_count

def write_clean_roster(records, path):
    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(path) or ".", exist_ok=True)
    with open(path, "w") as file:
        file.write("name,score,email\n")
        for record in records:
            file.write(f"{record['name']},{record['score']},{record['email']}\n")

def write_summary(records, path):
    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(path) or ".", exist_ok=True)
    with open(path, "w") as file:
        file.write(f"records={len(records)}\n")
        file.write(f"average={average_score(records):.1f}\n")
        file.write(f"passing={passing_count(records)}\n")

0.message: Sèvi ak write_clean_roster(...) pou kreye rapò lis pwòp la.

1.message: Sèvi ak write_summary(...) pou kreye rapò rezime a.

2.message: Ekri lis pwòp la pou output/clean_roster.csv.

cp-6-write-final-reports.solutionCode:
from tools.cleaning import clean_row
from tools.scoring import average_score, passing_count
from tools.reports import write_clean_roster, write_summary
from pathlib import Path
Path("output").mkdir(exist_ok=True)


records = []
with open("data/roster.csv") as file:
    next(file)
    for line in file:
        try:
            records.append(clean_row(line))
        except ValueError:
            continue

write_clean_roster(records, "output/clean_roster.csv")
write_summary(records, "output/summary.txt")
print(f"Cleaned {len(records)} records")
print(f"Average: {average_score(records):.1f}")
print(f"Passing: {passing_count(records)}")

try-class-roster-cleaner-sketch0.title: Netwaye premye anrejistreman lis la
try-class-roster-cleaner-sketch0.prompt: Ouvri `data/roster.csv`, sote ranje antèt la, netwaye premye dosye elèv la, epi enprime `Ava Smith <ava@example.com>`.
try-class-roster-cleaner-sketch0.hint: Sote antèt la, epi netwaye premye ranje done a anvan ou enprime li.

help.concept: Kat sa a itilize fòm fichye lis reyèl la ki soti nan capstone la olye de yon chèn ranje ki kode an di.
help.hint_1: Ouvri `data/roster.csv`, itilize `next(file)` yon fwa pou sote antèt la, epi li premye ranje done a.
help.hint_2: Separe liy lan, mete non an ak premye lèt majiskil, mete adrès imel la an lèt piti, epi enprime `Name <email>`.

try-class-roster-cleaner-sketch0.starterCode:
with open("data/roster.csv") as file:
    next(file)
    first_row = next(file)

# Clean the first student record and print Ava Smith <ava@example.com>.
try-class-roster-cleaner-sketch0.solutionCode:
with open("data/roster.csv") as file:
    next(file)
    first_row = next(file)

name, score, email = first_row.split(",")
print(f"{name.strip().title()} <{email.strip().lower()}>")

1.message: Sote ranje tit la anvan ou li premye elèv la.

2.message: Separe ranje lis la an pati li yo.

3.message: Mete non etidyan an an tit.

4.message: Ekri adrès imel la an lèt piti.

try_class_roster_cleaner_sketch0.title: Eseye l poukont ou
try_class_roster_cleaner_sketch0.prompt: Ouvri `data/roster.csv`, sote ranje antèt la, netwaye premye dosye elèv la, epi enprime `Ava Smith <ava@example.com>`.

sketch-1.title: Kliyan final ou a: biwo lekòl la
sketch-1.bodyMarkdown:
Jou rapò a ap pwoche, e biwo lekòl la gen yon ekspòtasyon lis non ki pa pare pou itilize. Non yo gen espasaj ak kapitalizasyon ki pa konsistan, nòt yo gen move valè, e anplwaye yo bezwen fichye pwòp yo ka fè konfyans.

Nan pwojè final sa a, w ap konstwi zouti yo te mande a. Pwojè a devlope san pwoblèm soti nan yon lektè fichye brit pou vin tounen yon netwayè plizyè fichye ak modil èd, fonksyon rezime, ak fichye rapò final. Chak etap kòmanse apati solisyon kanonik anvan an pou travay la sanble yon sèl pwojè reyèl, pa yon pil egzèsis ki pa konekte.
